MAIN-TRIG.stage-1: Stage 1 / Fire Selected Weapon / Group Fire Weapon Group 1 / [H] Engage Quantum / Fire Salvage Beam / Fire Mining Laser / Activate Scan
R-BB-1: Self Status Set Page / [H] / MFD 1 Select / [M] / Cast Left Select
R-BB-2: Target Status Set Page / [H] / MFD 2 Select / [M] / Unbound
R-BB-4: Vehicle Conﬁg Set Page / [H] / MFD 4 Select / [M] / Cycle MFD Page Backward
R-BB-5: Communication Set Page / [H] / MFD 5 Select / [M] / Cast Right Select
R-BB-6: IFCS Set Page / [H] / MFD 6 Select / [M] / Unbound
R-BB-7: Diagnostic Set Page / [H] / MFD 7 Select / [M] / Unbound
R-BB-8: Resource Network Set Page / [H] / MFD 8 Select / [M] / Cycle MFD Page Backward
R-CTL: right=Decoy Increase / [M] / Unbound | left=Decoy Decrease / [M] / Unbound | press-in=Missile Op Mode Toggle / [M] / Unbound
R-DATA: up=Fire Fracture / Increase Bomb HUD Range / Missile Count Up | right=Missile Type Next / [DT] / Weapon Preset  Next / Fire Right Tool / [M] / Right Modiﬁer Cycle | down=[DT] / Set Preset EMP/QID / Missle Count Down / Decrease Bomb HUD Range / Fire Disintegrate / [M] / Cycle Structural Modes | left=Missile Type Previous / [DT] / Weapon Preset Previous / Fire Left Tool / [M] / Left Modiﬁer Cycle | press-in=Reset Missile Count / Reset Bomb Range / Beam Axis Toggle
R-DEF: up=[M] / Mining Module 1 / Focus Fracture / Shields Fore | right=Shields Right / Focus Right Tool / [M] / Mining Module 3 | down=Shields Aft / Focus Disintegration | left=Shields Left / Focus Left Tool / [M] / Mining Module 2 | press-in=[H] / Shields Reset / Focus All Salvage Heads / Cycle Fracture/Extraction
R-PINKY: [H] / VOIP PTT / [DT][H] / VOIP PTT Proximity / [DT] / Chat Window Toggle / [M] / Selﬁe Cam / [M] / Accept Notiﬁcation / [M][DT] / Decline Notiﬁcation
R-POV: up=Capacitor Reset | right=Shield Cap Increase / [M] / Shield Cap Decrease / [H] / Shield Set to Max / [M][H] / Shield Set to Min | down=Thruster Cap Increase / [M] / Thruster Cap Decrease / [H] / Thruster Set to Max / [M][H] / Thruster Set to Min | left=Weapon Cap Increase / [M] / Weapon Cap Decrease / [H] / Weapon Set to Max / [M][H] / Weapon Set to Min
R-REV: Bomb Impact Toggle / Self Repair All
R-RT2: up=Speed Limiter ABS | down=Speed Limiter ABS
R-TGT: up=[DT] / Attackers Target Backward / [M] / Attackers Target Forward / Attackers Target Closest | right=Hostile Target Forward / [M] / Sub Target Forward / [DT] / All Target Forward | down=Hostile Target Closest / [M] / Sub Target Reset Main / [DT] / All Target Closest | left=Hostile Target Backward / [M] / Sub Target Backward / [DT] / All Target Backward | press-in=EyeTracker Target / 1 / Target Under Reticle / [DT] / Unlock Current Target
T-2: Turret Speed Limiter ABS / Acceleration Limiter ABS / 1
T-3: Mining Throttle ABS / Salvage Beam Spacing ABS / Bomb Range
T-BRK: right=Space Break | left=Scan Ping / [M] / Exit Seat/ / Exit Turret
T-COM: up=Stagger Mode / 1 / Stagger Mode / 1 / Remote Turret 1 | right=Remote Turret 3 | down=Turret  Gyro Mode / [M] / Turret VJoy / BROKEN / Start/Pause Stop Watch / * / [H] / Reset Stop Watch / * | left=Toggle Lead/Lag Pip / Remote Turret 2 | press-in=Gimbal Cycle Fixed/Auto / [H] / Recenter Turret / Salvage Gimbal Toggle / [DT] / Salvage Gimbal Reset
T-E1: up=Raise Speed Limiter | down=Lower Speed Limiter
T-E2: press-in=Unbound | Operator Mode Cycle / ( / Guns, / Missile, / Scanning, / Flight, / Quantum, / Mining, / Salvage, / )
T-E3: press-in=Bomb Reset Range | Turret Speed Limiter Incrimental / Tractor Distance Inc./Dec. / Bomb Hud Range Inc./Dec.
T-M1: up=Strafe Up | right=Strafe Right | down=Strafe Down | left=Strafe Left | press-in=Boost / Toggle SCM Limiter
T-NAV-1: Request Landing / Request Jumpgate / [DT] / Request Cargo
T-SPD-2: Cruise Toggle / Turret/ / Speed Limiter Toggle
T-SW3: up=Landing Gear Up | down=Landing Gear Down
T-WPN: up=[DT] / Reset 3rd Person Camera / Camera (3rd Person) / Toggle Docking Camera / [M] / Toggle Power On/Off | right=Dynamic Zoom / [H] / Missile Cinematic Camera / [M] / Shields Power Toggle | down=[M] / Thruster Power Toggle / [H] / Look Behind / Horn Vehicle | left=Head Tracking On/Off / [DT] / Reset Head Tracking / [M] / Weapon Power Toggle | press-in=[DT] / Precision Aiming / [H] / /Toggle Precision Aiming Zoom / Flight Ready
